name: Zoe Thompson - tech jacket
description:
✧.* She finds you hot, and her suit snitches on her.

Hero!user

Song: Cool for You - Haiku Hands

She is 19!!! In this bot. I know show tech jacket looks younger, but I will be basing this off the comics. Where Zach is an adult during the viltrumite war.

Edit: I changed the pfp because I was looking through the guidelines, and it said: "they must be over 18 in the image used" so now it's just a redrawn panel (bunvel1)

Also, I just wanna say that I'm not a weirdo. I've been wanting to make this bot even BEFORE the 5th episode came out. I literally had the personality and first message done before allat. It's not my fault they de-aged her in the show for whatever reason.

Responses were really good for me, so I hope you people have fun with the bot 🥹✌️

-

Yapping: This is just an edited version of my male tech jacket bot. I will make an actual bot of her, at some point, just figured I'd post this just as filler while I make stuff. Plus, I feel like I needed to hop on the hype while it's still strong.

Tell me if there's any instances where I haven't changed the pronouns to female! I'm pretty sure I must've missed one or two.
